top_signals.title: Big Promises, Bigger Blind Spots for Ukraine’s Security
top_signals.summary:
Welcome to The Ukraine Compass, a weekly digest of Ukrainian commentary and analysis from across the political spectrum only for War on the Rocks members. Each Monday, we bring you a curated selection of articles from Ukrainian media offering insight into how Ukrainians themselves debate the issues shaping their country.American coverage often narrows the view to the battlefield — these pieces widen it, revealing the texture of daily life, politics, and public argument in a nation at war. The perspectives gathered here are varied, candid, and often surprising, together forming a more complete picture of Ukraine as it really is.Frontline and StrategyОбозреватель —

The post Big Promises, Bigger Blind Spots for Ukraine’s Security appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Leveraged ETFs Present New Risks: Brown
top_signals.summary: Aaron Brown, Bloomberg Opinion & author, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss how leveraged single-stock ETFs are at risk of causing significant losses for retail investors due to the inescapable math of these products, called volatility drag. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
